description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light gray brick exterior and a dark, multi-gabled roof. The structure features several large rectangular windows, some grouped in pairs, and a prominent covered entryway with an arched opening. The house includes a fenced backyard with green lawn areas, palm trees, and a patio space, as well as a side garage with a driveway. The rear of the house has a partially covered outdoor living area, complete with patio furniture and a small pool or water feature. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines, a mix of flat and pitched roof sections, and a spacious, landscaped yard.
description: A modern two-story house with a gray brick exterior, dark gabled roof, large windows, and a landscaped backyard with palm trees and a patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched porch, large windows, and the dark gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and fenced backyard with palm trees and a pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, palm trees, and a covered section of the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the arched entryway, and the side yard with fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered arched entryway with a small porch, steps, and a prominent overhang
